title: Space and stars GUI
description: Spaced themed GUI - full of stars and nebulas.
body:
SPACE AND STARS GUI

 

This resource pack changes Minecraft GUI looks. This means your inventory, hotbar, interactive blocks and more (Healthbars of bosses are not changed). Now it's full of space, various nebulas and stars.

 

It doesn't require Optifine to work.

 

I plan to update it to newer versions when i have more time.

 

Feel free to point out any missing textures!

Now compatibility is available for some mods:

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/space-and-stars-mod-compatibility

 

Enjoy!

 

PS: I noticed my pack was being reuploaded to different sites (I know, i'm very fast). While i don't care about the revenue money, remember it's not me uploading there so be careful about viruses! Original files are on curseforge and modrinth.
